# OneSocial

> OneSocial is a credibility-first professional marketplace where Professionals find work, Hirers hire vetted talent, Agents represent talent, and Hosts sell event tickets — all unified by the OneScore™ trust metric.

OneSocial replaces guesswork in hiring with a portable reputation score (OneScore) backed by verified jobs, reviews, endorsements, events, and arena challenges. The platform handles contracts, escrow payments via Stripe, messaging, and 8.99% platform-fee escrow on every paid job and ticket.

## Core pages

- [Home](/): Marketplace overview and value proposition.
- [Find Work](/find-work): Professionals browse open jobs and pitch hirers.
- [Hire Talent](/hire-talent): Hirers browse vetted professionals by OneScore.
- [Discover Events](/discover-events): Public event marketplace with ticket sales.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans, fees, and platform pricing.
- [Features](/features): Full feature breakdown.
- [OneScore](/onescore): How the OneScore credibility metric works.
- [Score Calculator](/score-calculator): Estimate your OneScore.
- [Compare](/compare): OneSocial vs other freelance platforms.

## For each role

- [For Professionals](/for-professionals): How professionals get verified work.
- [For Hirers](/for-hirers): How hirers find trusted talent.
- [For Agents](/for-agents): How agents represent and monetize talent.
- [Pro Membership](/pro): Pro plan with reduced platform fees.

## Trust & methodology

- [Investor Relations](/investor-relations): Investor materials, traction, vision.
- [OneScore Methodology](/investor-relations/onescore-methodology): Detailed v9 algorithm — 7 weighted KPI buckets summing to 100%.
- [Score Badge](/score-badge): Embeddable trust badges for portfolios and websites.
- [Safety & Trust](/safety-trust): Verification, dispute resolution, payment protection.

## Blog (selected)

- [What Is OneScore?](/blog/what-is-onescore): Introduction to the credibility metric.
- [Portable Badge System](/blog/portable-badge-system): How verified reputation travels with you.
- [Contracts & Guaranteed Payments](/blog/contracts-guaranteed-payments): How escrow and mutual completion work.
- [End-to-End Freelance Ecosystem](/blog/end-to-end-freelance-ecosystem): Why a unified platform beats scattered tools.
- [AI Transforming the Freelance Marketplace](/blog/ai-transforming-freelance-marketplace): VAIA assistant and AI-driven matching.
